name: Bolognese Sauce (Meat Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Chopped pork or sausage meat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, lightly brown the garlic in olive oil and discard.
2. Add onion, celery, and carrot; sauté until translucent.
3. Add meat and lightly brown by stirring often.
4. Stir in tomato paste and simmer for 1 minute.
5. Add tomatoes, tomato puree, and water; simmer for 1 to 2 hours, stirring often.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve over cooked hot pasta or rice (optionally, substitute 1 cup water with 1 cup red wine).
